description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular surface and a deep reddish-brown coloration. The rock's exterior is marked by numerous jagged protrusions and crevices, giving it a natural, weathered appearance. Its surface is uneven and rough, with some areas appearing slightly glossier due to subtle highlights. The coloration is consistent throughout, suggesting a homogenous mineral composition, likely iron-rich stone such as basalt or a similar volcanic rock. The rock is solid and dense, with no visible cavities or openings. Its size and form make it suitable as a natural barrier or landscaping element in an urban park or roadside setting.
description: A rugged, reddish-brown rock with a jagged, uneven surface and natural weathered texture. Its solid, dense form and angular features make it suitable as an urban barrier or landscaping element.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's most jagged and angular side, with prominent protrusions and deep crevices.
description_view_1: This side appears slightly flatter with fewer deep crevices, but still maintains a rough, uneven texture.
description_view_2: This angle highlights a more rounded section with a mix of shallow and deep surface indentations.
description_view_3: This view presents the broadest, most uniform face of the rock, with subtle surface undulations and a consistent color.
attribute_location: urban park or roadside landscaping area
